evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Direct experience with LangGraph and LangChain, with examples of complex projects or contributions to these frameworks.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with LangGraph or LangChain, or only familiarity with similar technologies.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Proficiency in Python and AI/ML frameworks
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Strong proficiency in Python, with experience in AI/ML frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar, and ability to optimize models for local inference.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with Python or AI/ML frameworks.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with Small Language Models (SLMs) deployment
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Direct experience with deploying SLMs such as Mistral, Phi, or Llama, with examples of successful local model deployment and optimization.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with SLMs or their deployment.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Real-Time System Design and WebSockets experience
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with designing scalable backend systems using WebSockets for real-time communication, with examples of handling simultaneous client interactions.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with real-time system design or WebSockets.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with containerization using Docker, ensuring production-readiness and portability of AI services.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with containerization or DevOps practices.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with multi-agent architectures and stateful systems
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with designing and implementing stateful, multi-agent architectures where AI models can plan, execute, and correct their own actions.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with multi-agent architectures or stateful systems.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Education in Computer Science or Data Science
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, with preference given to candidates pursuing a degree or certification in Data Science.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No relevant degree or education in Computer Science or Data Science.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with optimizing SQL queries for performance, with examples of significant improvements.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with SQL optimization.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Familiarity with agile development methodologies, such as Scrum or Kanban, with experience in iterative development and continuous improvement.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with agile development methodologies.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Contributions to open-source AI projects, such as LangGraph, LangChain, or similar, with examples of significant contributions or community engagement.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with open-source AI projects or contributions.

results.name: Sampath
results.content: Sampath Krishna Tekumalla Bengaluru, India 561203 • +91-9490523667 • kittu.tekumalla@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/sampath2211 • github.com/Sampath-2211 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Final-year Computer Science student specializing in multi-agent AI workflows with hands-on experience in LangChain, LangGraph, and Docker. Passionate about building scalable LLM-powered applications. Proven ability to translate complex technical workflows into user-friendly, production-ready AI systems through academic research and industry experience at the National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO. EDUCATION Gitam University - CGPA: 8.36​ Sep 2022 - Apr 2026 Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering ​ Bengaluru, India Coursework : DSA, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, DBMS, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence. Indian Institute of Technology, Madras - CGPA: 7.0​ Sep 2023 - Apr 2027 Bachelor of Science in Data Science ​ Remote Coursework : Mathematics, Probability and Statistics, Computational Intelligence, Python. WORK EXPERIENCE National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ May 2025 - August 2025 AI Engineer Intern, Earth and Climate Sciences Area (ECSA)​ ​ ​ Hyderabad, India Agentic AI For Satellite Geospatial Data Inference Advisors: Rounaq Goenka ●​ Situation : Geospatial data analysis required technical expertise, preventing non-technical users from accessing insights from spatial datasets through complex programming requirements. ●​ Task : To build an AI system enabling users to analyse geospatial data through simple natural language queries without domain expertise. ●​ Action: Integrated LangChain for function-calling capabilities, architected a modular workflow with LangGraph, and deployed Mistral 7B for natural language query processing and response generation, alongside Phi-3 Mini for Python code generation. ●​ Result : Successfully built an AI-powered application that democratizes geospatial analysis, allowing non-technical users to obtain insights through conversational queries. SKILLS P ROGRAMMING L ANGUAGES AND L IBRARIES : C, Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, SQL. S OFTWARE T OOLS ​ : OnlineGDB, Google Colab, Visual Studio Code, Anaconda-Navigator, Docker. AI/ML F RAMEWORKS : LangChain, LangGraph, Ollama PROJECTS Vehicle Data Management System for Autonomous Vehicles ​ Jul, 2024 - Oct, 2024 ●​ Engineered a structured database to store and manage vehicle GPS data, sensor readings, and system status for real-time monitoring. ●​ Structured SQL tables and optimized query structures to enable efficient tracking of vehicle locations, battery levels, and engine performance. ●​ Developed automated logging and data organization processes, reducing manual data retrieval time by 50%. ●​ Implemented SQL views and joins to streamline fleet management, improving reporting accuracy and data-driven decision-making. Real Time Communication with Multiple Clients and Server GitHub ​ Mar, 2024 - Aug, 2024 ●​ Architected and developed a WebSocket-based real-time chat system supporting simultaneous multi-client communication, boosting collaboration efficiency. ●​ Optimized server response times, reducing message latency to under 100ms to ensure smooth, real-time interactions. ●​ Created an interactive and secure HTML-based interface with access control features, enhancing authentication and user security. ●​ Incorporated file-sharing functionality with permission-based access, improving data protection and preventing unauthorized usage. CERTIFICATIONS ●​ Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Cloud Computing Fundamentals ●​ Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Infrastructure in Google Cloud ●​ Python Programming - Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python) - University of Michigan WORKSHOPS ●​ Participated in the “Code, Create & Conquer – Unleash Your Brilliance” Hackfest , organized by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at GITAM (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru, from October 13–15, 2023. ●​ As a member of the Software-Defined Vehicles section at MURTHI LAB , I had the opportunity to demonstrate a self-designed autonomous buggy developed in collaboration with VIRYA Technologies and Infosys at the “Connected, Autonomous & Electric Vehicle EXPO 2025” , held at KTPO, Bengaluru, on April 24–25, 2025 — showcasing real-time navigation capabilities to CEOs and industry leaders. EXTRA-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES ●​ Technical Lead of G-Studio , the official photography club of GITAM University Bangalore, overseeing technical operations and providing support for photography events since August 2024 – May 2025. ●​ Silver Medalist in school-level badminton competition; active player representing college events. ●​ Secured 1st place in a school-wide painting competition while in 5th grade, outperforming senior grades up to 10th.

results.content: Summary Motivated computer science student with skills in C, C++, and app development. Experienced in AIML, Robotics and familiarity in SLAM technology, through real-world projects, hackathons and internship programs. Strong problem-solver and team player, passionate about building scalable, impactful software solutions. Education • B.Tech - Computer Science and Business Systems GITAM University, Bengaluru Expected Graduation: 2026 | Current CGPA: 9.95 Technical Skills • Programming: C, C++, Dart, Python • Tools & Technologies: Android Studio, Flutter, RoboPlus • Emerging Tech: AIML, LiDAR, Voice Recognition, SLAM • Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOPs, DBMS. Projects • Machine Learning: Credit Card Fraud Detection – Implemented Isolation Forest Algorithm for fraud detection. • App Development – Basic Chatting Application using [ Xml + Java]. • Web Application – Medical Appointment booking with Multilingual integration. • Autonomous Vehicle for Differently-Abled (Ongoing) Used: AI, LiDAR, IoT, Python, Voice Recognition Designed a mobility solution for people without limbs using sensor-based automation and paddle-less navigation. • Drug Inventory & Supply Chain Management System using Blockchain Used: Blockchain, IoT, RFID Created a decentralized drug-tracking system to eliminate counterfeit medicine distribution. Experience & Certifications • Internship: Intern – Robotics and AI Sirena Technologies : 5 th May 2025 – 30 th June 2025 Selected for a hands-on internship focused on Robotics and Artificial Intelligence. Hands on Experience with Embedded Systems, Sensors, Robotics. Certifications: • Data Sciences & Analytics – HP Life • Agile Project management – HP Life • Microeconomics Principles by ILLIONOIS • Introduction to R Programming by IBM • English for Career Development by Penn (University of Pennsylvania) • Data Structures by UC San Diego Awards & Achievements • 1st Place – SIH Internal Hackathon (Software Category), Drug Inventory and supply chain management system • Innovation Competition (Autonomous Vehicle for Differently-Abled Project) – Till IGC level at NITK Surathkal • Namma Yatri Mobility Challenge (Unstop) – 2023 • AWS x POI Hackathon – Till Finale - 2025 • NCC Achievements: ‘A’, ‘B’ & ‘C’ Certificates with ‘A’ Grade | One of the Top NCC Rank Holders (JUO) Hobbies : Reading Crime and Investigative novels | Workout | Music | Dance [Free style & Semi classical] | Painting Skills: Communication & Collaboration | Teamwork | Adaptability | Problem-Solving. Languages Known: English (Fluent) | Hindi (Conversational) | Telugu (Native) | Kannada (Fluent) pavithra13082004@gmail.com +91 9391304581 LinkedIn Bangalore Karnataka India Mallangi Pavithra

While they have some programming skills, their experience with AI/ML frameworks is limited, and they have no experience with real-time system design or WebSockets.
